record.field: <form><sheet><group><field name="name"/><field name="model_id" domain="[('transient','=',False)]" options="{'no_create': True}"/><field name="model_name"/><field name="state"/><field name="active"/><field name="code"/></group></sheet></form>

<search string="Server Actions"><field name="name" string="Server Action"/><field name="model_id"/><field name="binding_model_id"/><field name="state"/><field name="code"/><separator/><filter string="Active" name="active" domain="[('active','=',True)]"/><filter string="Code" name="code" domain="[('state','=','code')]"/><group expand="0" string="Group By"><filter string="Model" name="group_model" context="{'group_by':'model_id'}"/><filter string="Binding Model" name="group_binding_model" context="{'group_by':'binding_model_id'}"/><filter string="State" name="group_state" context="{'group_by':'state'}"/></group></search>
<list><field name="priority"/><field name="name"/><field name="model_id"/><field name="nextcall"/><field name="interval_number"/><field name="interval_type"/><field name="active"/></list>

<form><sheet><group><field name="name"/><field name="model_id"/><field name="user_id"/><field name="interval_number"/><field name="interval_type"/><field name="active"/><field name="nextcall"/><field name="priority"/><field name="code"/></group></sheet></form>

<form><sheet><group><field name="name"/><field name="active"/><field name="model_id"/><field name="model_name"/><field name="trigger"/><field name="action_server_id"/><field name="description"/></group></sheet></form>

<form><sheet><group><field name="role" readonly="1"/><field name="active"/><field name="notification_type"/><field name="signature"/></group><notebook name="access_notebook"><page string="Access Rights" name="access_rights"><field name="group_ids" widget="res_user_group_ids"/></page><page string="Preferences" name="preferences"><field name="company_ids"/><field name="company_id"/></page><page string="Calendar" name="calendar"/><page string="Security" name="security"/></notebook></sheet></form>

<form string="Change My Preferences"><sheet><group><field name="name"/><field name="login"/><field name="email"/><field name="lang"/><field name="tz"/><field name="notification_type"/><field name="signature"/></group></sheet><footer><button name="preference_save" type="object" string="Update Preferences" class="btn-primary"/><button name="preference_cancel" string="Discard" special="cancel" class="btn-secondary"/></footer></form>
<search string="Users"><field name="name"/><field name="login"/><field name="email"/><filter string="Internal Users" name="internal_users" domain="[('share','=',False)]" default="1"/></search>

<form><sheet><group><field name="name"/><field name="privilege_id"/><field name="share"/><field name="api_key_duration"/></group><notebook><page string="Users" name="users"><field name="user_ids"/></page><page string="Inherited" name="inherited"><field name="implied_ids"/></page><page string="Menus" name="menus"><field name="menu_access"/></page><page string="Views" name="views"><field name="view_access"/></page><page string="Access Rights" name="access_rights"><field name="model_access"/></page><page string="Record Rules" name="record_rules"><field name="rule_groups"/></page><page string="Notes" name="notes"><field name="comment"/></page></notebook></sheet></form>

<search string="Groups"><field name="name"/><field name="full_name"/><field name="category_id"/><filter string="Internal Groups" name="internal_groups" domain="[('share','=',False)]" default="1"/></search>
<form><sheet><group><field name="name"/><field name="model"/><field name="type"/><field name="mode"/><field name="priority"/><field name="active"/><field name="arch"/></group></sheet></form>
<form><sheet><group><field name="name"/><field name="parent_id"/><field name="action"/><field name="sequence"/><field name="groups_id"/><field name="active"/></group></sheet></form>
<form><sheet><group><field name="model"/><field name="name"/><field name="ttype"/><field name="relation"/><field name="relation_field"/><field name="groups"/></group></sheet></form>
<list><field name="name"/><field name="model_id"/><field name="group_id"/><field name="perm_read"/><field name="perm_write"/><field name="perm_create"/><field name="perm_unlink"/></list>

<form><sheet><group><field name="name"/><field name="model_id"/><field name="group_id"/><field name="perm_read"/><field name="perm_write"/><field name="perm_create"/><field name="perm_unlink"/><field name="active"/></group></sheet></form>

<list><field name="name"/><field name="model_id"/><field name="global"/><field name="active"/><field name="perm_read"/><field name="perm_write"/><field name="perm_create"/><field name="perm_unlink"/></list>

<form><sheet><group><field name="name"/><field name="model_id"/><field name="domain_force"/><field name="groups"/><field name="global"/><field name="active"/><field name="perm_read"/><field name="perm_write"/><field name="perm_create"/><field name="perm_unlink"/></group></sheet></form>

<form><sheet><group><field name="name"/><field name="model_id"/><field name="subject"/><field name="email_from"/><field name="email_to"/><field name="body_html"/><field name="active"/></group></sheet></form>

<form><sheet><group><field name="name"/><field name="smtp_host"/><field name="smtp_port"/><field name="smtp_encryption"/><field name="smtp_authentication"/><field name="smtp_user"/><field name="smtp_pass"/><field name="active"/></group></sheet></form>
<list><field name="name"/><field name="server_type"/><field name="server"/><field name="port"/><field name="state"/><field name="active"/></list>

<form><sheet><group><field name="name"/><field name="server_type"/><field name="server"/><field name="port"/><field name="is_ssl"/><field name="user"/><field name="password"/><field name="object_id"/><field name="priority"/><field name="active"/></group></sheet></form>

<form><sheet><group><field name="subject"/><field name="email_from"/><field name="email_to"/><field name="state"/><field name="scheduled_date"/><field name="body_html"/><field name="failure_reason"/></group></sheet></form>
<list><field name="subject"/><field name="message_type"/><field name="model"/><field name="res_id"/><field name="email_from"/><field name="date"/></list>

<form><sheet><group><field name="subject"/><field name="message_type"/><field name="model"/><field name="res_id"/><field name="email_from"/><field name="date"/><field name="body"/></group></sheet></form>

<form><sheet><group><field name="name"/><field name="type"/><field name="xml_id"/><field name="path"/><field name="binding_model_id"/><field name="binding_type"/><field name="binding_view_types"/></group></sheet></form>

<form><sheet><group><field name="name"/><field name="res_model"/><field name="view_mode"/><field name="mobile_view_mode"/><field name="view_id"/><field name="search_view_id"/><field name="domain"/><field name="context"/><field name="target"/><field name="path"/></group></sheet></form>

<form><sheet><group><field name="name"/><field name="model"/><field name="report_name"/><field name="report_type"/><field name="report_file"/><field name="paperformat_id"/><field name="binding_model_id"/><field name="binding_type"/></group></sheet></form>
<form><sheet><group><field name="name"/><field name="tag"/><field name="res_model"/><field name="target"/><field name="context"/><field name="params"/></group></sheet></form>

<form><sheet><group><field name="name"/><field name="url"/><field name="target"/><field name="close"/><field name="binding_model_id"/><field name="binding_type"/><field name="binding_view_types"/></group></sheet></form>

<form><sheet><group><field name="name"/><field name="sequence"/><field name="parent_action_id"/><field name="parent_res_model"/><field name="action_id"/><field name="python_method"/><field name="default_view_mode"/><field name="domain"/><field name="context"/><field name="is_visible"/></group></sheet></form>
<form><sheet><group><field name="module"/><field name="name"/><field name="complete_name"/><field name="model"/><field name="res_id"/><field name="noupdate"/></group></sheet></form>

<form><sheet><group><field name="name"/><field name="code"/><field name="implementation"/><field name="prefix"/><field name="suffix"/><field name="padding"/><field name="number_next"/><field name="number_increment"/><field name="company_id"/><field name="active"/></group></sheet></form>
<list><field name="name"/><field name="res_model"/><field name="res_id"/><field name="type"/><field name="mimetype"/><field name="file_size"/></list>

<form><sheet><group><field name="name"/><field name="res_model"/><field name="res_field"/><field name="res_id"/><field name="type"/><field name="url"/><field name="mimetype"/><field name="file_size"/><field name="public"/></group></sheet></form>
<list><field name="name"/><field name="bundle"/><field name="directive"/><field name="path"/><field name="sequence"/><field name="active"/></list>
<form><sheet><group><field name="name"/><field name="active"/><field name="bundle"/><field name="directive"/><field name="path"/><field name="target"/><field name="sequence"/></group></sheet></form>

<form><sheet><group><field name="name"/><field name="default"/><field name="format"/><field name="page_height"/><field name="page_width"/><field name="orientation"/><field name="margin_top"/><field name="margin_bottom"/><field name="margin_left"/><field name="margin_right"/><field name="dpi"/></group></sheet></form>
<list><field name="name"/><field name="model_id"/><field name="user_id"/><field name="user_ids"/><field name="is_default"/><field name="active"/></list>

<form><sheet><group><field name="name"/><field name="model_id"/><field name="domain"/><field name="context"/><field name="sort"/><field name="user_id"/><field name="user_ids"/><field name="action_id"/><field name="embedded_action_id"/><field name="is_default"/><field name="active"/></group></sheet></form>

<form><sheet><group><field name="name"/><field name="code"/><field name="iso_code"/><field name="url_code"/><field name="direction"/><field name="date_format"/><field name="time_format"/><field name="week_start"/><field name="active"/></group></sheet></form>

<form><sheet><group><field name="mail_message_id"/><field name="field_id"/><field name="field_name"/><field name="field_desc"/><field name="field_type"/><field name="old_value_char"/><field name="new_value_char"/></group></sheet></form>

<form><sheet><group><field name="mail_message_id"/><field name="mail_mail_id"/><field name="res_partner_id"/><field name="notification_type"/><field name="notification_status"/><field name="failure_type"/><field name="failure_reason"/></group></sheet></form>
<list><field name="res_model"/><field name="res_id"/><field name="activity_type_id"/><field name="user_id"/><field name="date_deadline"/><field name="state"/></list>

<form><sheet><group><field name="activity_type_id"/><field name="res_model"/><field name="res_id"/><field name="user_id"/><field name="date_deadline"/><field name="summary"/><field name="note"/><field name="state"/><field name="active"/></group></sheet></form>

<form><sheet><group><field name="name"/><field name="summary"/><field name="res_model"/><field name="category"/><field name="default_note"/><field name="default_user_id"/><field name="delay_count"/><field name="delay_unit"/><field name="active"/></group></sheet></form>

<form><sheet><group><field name="subject"/><field name="model"/><field name="res_id"/><field name="scheduled_date"/><field name="author_id"/><field name="mail_message_id"/><field name="mail_mail_id"/><field name="state"/></group></sheet></form>

<form><sheet><group><field name="alias_name"/><field name="alias_model_id"/><field name="model_name"/><field name="alias_domain_id"/><field name="alias_contact"/><field name="alias_defaults"/><field name="alias_user_id"/><field name="active"/></group></sheet></form>
